title: Festive Party Set of 4 Xmas Mugs - Home & Office Tea & Coffee Cups - Ceramic Winter Tableware
features: CHRISTMAS SPIRIT: Merry Christmas! Get in the festive spirit with this set of ceramic novelty Christmas mugs by Mad About Mugs. The mugs come in 4 assorted designs, each of them illustrated with different cute Christmas character: reindeer, snowman, Santa or an Elf. All mugs are decorated with red snowflakes and with Christmas motto. These mugs are perfect for cosying up with a mug full of hot chocolate with marshmallows on a chilly winter's night.

HOT STUFF: They're also great for serving hot beverages to your guests such as mulled wine and hot toddy's. Or, if you just like to feel all Christmassy - they're ideal for your everyday use for tea and coffee whether you're at home or whether you're spreading Christmas cheer around the office at work!

SIZE & MATERIAL: Approximate dimensions: Diameter at Rim: 7.5cm, Height: 9.5cm, Material: Ceramic. These mugs would be great as a finishing touch on your Christmas table or if you are hosting a festive party. With the range of beverage, you could serve in these, they are great for any time of the day
